plugins.name: trunk-sync
plugins.description: Auto-commit and push every file edit, keeping multiple agents in sync on trunk

plugins.name: req-mod-sync
plugins.description: Stop hook that prompts Claude to keep CLAUDE.md requirements, mental model, and repo map up to date

plugins.name: test-trees
plugins.description: Enforces test-driven development with human-readable test tree output

plugins.name: contree
plugins.description: Test trees as living requirements — TDD with auto-synced specifications in CLAUDE.md

plugins.name: openclaw-notifier
plugins.description: Notifies OpenClaw when a subagent completes a task via SubagentStop hook
